creator: ohartman@mail.zedat.fu-berlin.de
text:
FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/136371'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs. 
>
> You can access the state of your problem report at any time
> via this link:
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=136371
>
>   
>> Category:       ports
>> Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
>> Synopsis:       port/graphics/ImageMagick: Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick/work/ImageMagick-6.5.3-10; 1 of 39 tests failed
>> Arrival-Date:   Mon Jul 06 10:00:10 UTC 2009
>>     
After adding 'build modules' in config, this specific error went away
and ImageMagick could be build. Removing config by 'make rmconfig' and
leave the build on defaults crahes on SMP boxes as described.

oh
